title: bulbophyllum amplebracteatum subsp. amplebracteatum
intro: Bulbophyllum amplebracteatum subsp. amplebracteatum is a species of orchid native to Asia, specifically found in the tropical regions of India, China, and Southeast Asia. It is an epiphytic orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum amplebracteatum subsp. amplebracteatum include infusions and decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
